rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Trace JSON could not be parsed.

rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Trace has no observable steps, messages, actions, or tool events.

rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Trace contains error, exception, timeout, or failure text.

rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Trace does not expose a non-empty final answer or final response.

rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Most observed steps have empty results.

rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Same action repeats consecutively, suggesting a loop or stuck agent.

rules.label: badcase
rules.description: Trace has many steps, which is a weak risk signal for inefficient or stuck execution.

rules.label: goodcase
rules.description: Trace contains a non-empty final answer or final response.

rules.label: goodcase
rules.description: Most observed steps have non-empty results.

rules.label: goodcase
rules.description: Trace has no error text and no repeated-action loop signal.
